title: Dehaasia cuneata
taxonomy: Dehaasia cuneata is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to parts of Asia and is classified within the genus Dehaasia, which consists of evergreen trees and shrubs. The classification of Dehaasia cuneata is further divided into its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Magnoliophyta), class (Magnoliopsida), and order (Laurales). This plant is part of the Lauraceae family, which includes other evergreen species. Dehaasia cuneata's classification is still being studied and refined by botanists.
